title: Delta is adding winter service between Boston and Rome in 2027
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Delta Air Lines will add winter flights between Boston and Rome starting January 2027.
The new service will operate four times weekly, resuming daily service in March 2027.
Tickets for 2027 winter flights between Boston and Rome go on sale April 4, 2026.

title: He’s running his second Boston Marathon for Brigham and Women’s Hospital
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Joe Greeley, 30, from Charlestown, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Brigham and Women's Hospital.
This is Greeley's second marathon run for Stepping Strong, following his participation in 2024.
His decision to run again was influenced by missing the event in 2025 and encouragement from team organizers.

title: ‘Real Housewives of Rhode Island’: Everything that happened in Episode 1
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: 'The Real Housewives of Rhode Island' debuted with a 90-minute pilot episode on Bravo.
The episode introduces six cast members and includes wedding pressures and business ventures.
A beach picnic scene features notable confrontations and rumors among the cast members.

title: 8 gorgeous places in New England to see daffodils this spring
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Newport, R.I. hosts Daffodil Days featuring over 1.5 million daffodils and events like trolley tours and a dog parade.
The 50th annual Nantucket Community Daffodil Flower Show includes a hat contest, tailgate picnic, and antique car parade.
Meriden, Conn. holds a festival with 600,000 daffodils, live music stages, fireworks, and a large craft fair at Hubbard Park.

title: Watch the Red Sox Opening Day ceremony honoring 1986 team
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: The Red Sox honored the 1986 team on Opening Day at Fenway Park, celebrating their American League pennant win.
Approximately 25 players from the 1986 team attended the ceremony, including Wade Boggs and Dwight Evans.
The event featured a national anthem performance by Nik Walker and color presentation by the Vermont National Guard.

title: Review & setlist: From flames to twerk-offs, Cardi B commands TD Garden
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Cardi B performed a sold-out concert at Boston's TD Garden as part of her 'Little Miss Drama' North American tour.
The show featured 37 songs with pyrotechnics, costumes, and intricate choreography, grossing over $32 million in ticket sales.
A standout moment included a $2,000 'twerk-off' and a 'mute challenge,' showcasing Cardi B's dynamic engagement with the audience.

title: Emmy winner Amy Poehler spotted at popular Somerville coffee shop
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Amy Poehler visited Diesel Cafe in Somerville, Massachusetts, surprising staff and patrons.
The cafe shared a photo of Poehler with employee Autumn on social media.
Poehler, from Burlington, is known for 'Parks and Recreation' and 'Saturday Night Live.'

title: Oscar-winning actress Emma Stone visits North End restaurant
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Emma Stone visited Arya Trattoria in Boston's North End, known for its Italian cuisine, on Thursday.
Stone, a two-time Oscar winner, notably won Best Actress in 2016 for 'La La Land' and 2023 for 'Poor Things.'
Arya Trattoria is a frequent celebrity spot, previously hosting Dwayne Johnson and Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla.

title: Adam Schefter explains how ‘Hard Knocks’ finally landed the Patriots
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: The Patriots and Seahawks will participate in 'Hard Knocks,' with the Patriots appearing in 2027.
The NFL secured the Patriots' participation by confirming a 2027 spot, a tactic against common team delays.
Eligibility changes now allow the Patriots to appear on 'Hard Knocks,' removing their previous playoff exemption.

title: Mass. high school pitcher Brody Bumila’s fastball tops 100 mph, draws crowd of MLB scouts
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Bishop Feehan pitcher Brody Bumila reached 100 mph on the radar gun in a game against Hopkinton.
Bumila struck out nine batters in three innings, attracting around 50 MLB scouts to the game.
Ranked 69th by Baseball America, Bumila is committed to the University of Texas but might go pro.
